name: Grilled Pork Butt Slices
recipeIngredient: 4 slices pork butt, cut 1/2 inch thick
1 tablespoon finely powdered dried pasilla chile
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the slices of meat lightly with oil.
2. Combine garlic, the powdered pasilla, and half the parsley; mix very well and pat on both sides of each slice of meat.
3. Let stand while preparing the mustard.
4. Mix Dijon, finely powdered chipotle, and as little or as much broth or water as desired.
5. Grill the chops for 3 or 4 minutes on each side, seasoning well with salt and pepper.
6. Serve with the prepared mustard and sprinkle with remaining parsley.
Serves 4.
